ratings.en: Sakura no ki no shita de/Maikai tsuzuku kono kanji?!/Toriaizu nuidemiyouka
Toki ni kimi wa S ka M ka/Naraba kimi no sono chikara o tamesasetemoraou/Kirakira to kagayaku koitsu wa onushi no nanda?
Warenagara migoto na tsutsumiguaida/Kaichou! Motto suso o hirogechatte kudasai!/Mou manpuku nanoka?!
Dakara mie naito Korode Chaku Kuzushi Teiru/omedetaa/dakara watashi hakoko madedeii
Oshiri, Taihen desho?/Yokkyou Fuman na dake da!/Watashi mo Pan o Kuwaete Toukou Shinakya!
Tsuda-kun wa Yomanai wa! Tsukau no yo!/Uke ga Aru nara Seme ga Aru darou!/Iya, Fuku wa Kite Koi
A?! Omae wa Asa no Ichigo Pantsu!/Fudeoroshi ga Hayaru kamo Shiren/Minna no Bun made Watashi ga Tatakau!
Ikura de Kaimasu?/Naruhodo! Kankei Nai na! Oretachi!/Benezuera
Meido wa Mita! Ojou-sama no Midara na (Ryaku)/Ore ni Sonna Kyara Settei wa NaiWatashi de Yokereba Tsukiau ga
Dandan Oukiku natteku wa/Tsuda-kun wa Boizu Rabu
Seitokai Yakuindomo! Otsu!
Kaettekita Seitokai Yakuindomo
Konna Seiri Genshou Mita Koto ga Nai/Shitagi mo Tsuketa Hou ga Ii?/Santa-san no Seiheki
Ippanteki na Hajirai desu/Seifuku wa Han Nugi ga Suoba da yo/Kimi nari no Roshutsu Purei ja Nakatta no ka?
Hanpanai Aniki/Jidoukai Yakuindomo
Kibun ha Aozora, Kaichou ha Buru/Hai Risuku ga Kimochiii/Dougi no Kunshou/Ousai-Eiryou Gakuen Kouryiukai!
Mata Sakura no Ki no Shita de/Nemunemu no Kisetsu Poro/Neko o Kabutta Oukami
Hagimura Suzu o Mimamotteimashita/Ousai-Eiryou Gakuen Kouryoukai Okawari!/Shoujo Chekku Joubi wa Poke Tisshu
Mikka Fukukaichou/Chindara Kanushama yo
Kyochou bui buibuibui/Moe teiru/Kakkiteki zuru muke
Sasae Sutairu/Nugiato Mokkori/Tatakau Shoujo-tachi
Aidoru Seitokai Chou/Kogeki Aitemu Bikubbikun
Nami to no tawamure bichobichoda ze/Bannou uingu/Natsu no yo, natsu no asa
Umai koto itte yatta ze/Kimi o terasu ookii sonzai/Mita manma tarenagashi
Hata Ranko kamasu/OG wa choberigu/Guzen gokai itadaki chuu
Tsuda kinoko wa soutei nai/Hane ga tobu/Kabocha no kimochi
Ura yougo ni jun hannou/Ichibu no kunide wa sourashiidesu/Yuki to tawamure, Santa no matsuei
Akeomeda yo/Hito no ue ni tatsu utsuwa/Doutei/Sore o arau nante tondemonai
Tadashii koi bana/Enkyori atakku/Ke no rainnari/Sakura no sora
